identity.name: Quadley
identity.theme_strategy: Modern Academic - Deep Navy anchor with crisp whites and sophisticated neutrals.

headings.usage: All section headers, modal titles, and hero text.

body.usage: General text, data tables, form inputs.

primary.name: Oxford Navy
primary.description: The anchor color. Used for primary actions, sidebar backgrounds, and strong headings.

secondary.name: Academic Gold
secondary.description: Used for accents, highlights, and 'premium' features.

success.name: Campus Green
success.description: For positive states, growth metrics, and wellbeing indicators.

layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. gap-6 for grids.
layout.sidebar: Fixed width (280px), dark themed for high contrast.
layout.card_style: Flat, 1px border (border-slate-200), shadow-sm. No heavy drop shadows.

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-md px-4 py-2

inputs.style: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-slate-900 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-slate-900 rounded-md h-11 px-4 transition-all

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

badges.style: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase

visual_enhancers.texture: Use subtle noise overlays on dark backgrounds to prevent banding.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-xl for containers, rounded-md for inner elements

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Update tailwind.config.js to use the new color palette (Slate 900 as primary).
2. Update index.css to refine the CSS variables for a cleaner, higher contrast look.
3. Replace 'Montserrat' with 'Manrope' and 'Public Sans' via Google Fonts import.
4. Refactor the Sidebar to be a dark, high-contrast vertical navigation.
5. Update the Dashboard layouts to use the Bento Grid system.
6. Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
7. Use the provided image URLs for hero sections and dummy data.
8. Do NOT use gradients for buttons; keep them solid and authoritative.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid 'AI Slop' - no generic centered layouts.
Dark colors must be solid, not gradients.
Interactive elements must have micro-interactions (hover, focus).
